final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup; floral accents with purple flowers; soft lighting
Composition: three-column hero layout — left text column, center model, right product display; header with logo + 5 nav links + CTA button; bottom benefit cards row
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle; dropper bottle and packaging box displayed in right column
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with floral purple flower accents
Lighting/mood: soft, airy, bright
Color palette: soft pink and white primary palette, gold accents on stat cards, purple flower accents
Materials/textures: floating white rounded rectangle cards with gold accents; pill-shaped feature badges with small icons; pink checkmark bullet points
Text (verbatim): Logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY" · Nav: "特徴" "成分" "お客様の声" "使い方" "FAQ" · Header CTA: "今すぐ試す" · Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" · Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" · Feature badges: "敏感肌OK" "高保湿" "朝晩使える" · Bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" "続けやすいシンプルケア" · Hero CTAs: "初回限定で試してみる >" "成分をチェック >" · Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" · Stat cards: "満足度 96%" "美容成分 5種配合" "愛用者 12,000人突破" · Benefit cards: "うるおい" "透明感" "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; stat cards are floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents; feature badges are pill-shaped with small icons; bullet points use pink checkmarks; benefit cards are horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons
Avoid:
